title: When the Boys Meet the Girls
writer: Robert E. Kent, Guy Bolton, Jack McGowan
actors: Connie Francis, Harve Presnell, Peter Noone
plot: Young heir Danny Churchill tries to help Ginger, an attractive postal worker in rural Nevada, save her father's ranch from closing due to being heavily in debt with some Reno gangster-types for her father's compulsive gambling. Wi...
